Volty / Design

Every part earns its place.

The U-1 was drawn for one job: moving goods, all day, at the lowest cost per kilometer in this market. Nothing on it is decoration.

The Design

Every part earns its place.

The U-1 was drawn for one job: moving goods, all day, at the lowest cost per kilometer in this market. Nothing on it is decoration. If a part does not help you earn, carry, or keep going, it is not on the bike.

Look at the silhouette. The frame runs flat and straight from headstock to tail, so the load sits low and centered. A loaded U-1 still feels like an empty one. That is not styling. That is a full lunch rush that does not fight you in traffic.

01 / Seen

A face that owns the dark

The full ring lights before dawn and after dusk, the hours delivery actually runs. Drivers see you early. Long life LED means one less thing to replace out of your own pocket.

02 / Serviced

Fixed at any corner shop

Exposed chain, bolt-on panels, standard suspension. Any mechanic on any street can keep it running, no dealer, no special tool, no waiting. Downtime is money, so we designed it out.

03 / Loaded

Built to carry, built to stop

The rear rack is part of the frame, not an add-on, rated for real cargo and a passenger. Disc brakes haul a full load down to zero, again and again, in the rain, on the hundredth stop.

Efficiency you can feel in your pocket at the end of the week. That is the whole design.
